Ltx23QualityAudioToVideoInput.title: LTX23QualityAudioToVideoInput
Ltx23QualityAudioToVideoInput.description:
Audio-to-video generation driven by an uploaded audio track.

Backed by the Comfy IA2V two-stage workflow, normalized to the same pinned
LTX-2.3 base checkpoint, text encoder, spatial upscaler, and distilled
LoRA used by the official Lightricks T2V/I2V workflow.
